title: orchis mediterranea subsp. pseudosambucina
intro: Orchis mediterranea subsp. pseudosambucina, also known as the Mediterranean orchid or pseudosambucina orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Orchis mediterranea subsp. pseudosambucina include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive problems, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
